# Ralph Loop Audit

Status: reviewed
Owner: ProductOS PM
Audience: PM Builder, PM Leader / Communicator, go-to-market
Updated at: 2026-03-22
Source artifact ids: `ralph_loop_state_ws_productos_v2_v4_2_live_docs`, `document_sync_state_ws_productos_v2_v4_2_live_docs`, `validation_lane_report_ws_productos_v2_live_docs`, `manual_validation_record_ws_productos_v2_live_docs`, `rejected_path_record_ws_productos_v2_live_docs_claims`

## Inspect

The repo already had internal readable docs, presentation governance, and market-intelligence evidence. It did not yet have a governed live-doc and messaging bundle for explaining ProductOS itself.

## Review

The main risk was letting marketing copy become a side channel with weaker standards than the product docs. The reviewed plan keeps product overview, getting started, positioning, and messaging in one synced bundle.

## Implement

The workspace now has concrete `docs/product/` and `docs/marketing/` documents plus a dedicated live-doc sync state and Ralph-governance artifacts.

## Validate

The slice was validated through source-link coverage, metadata checks, schema validation for the new artifacts, and targeted PM Leader review.

## Fix

One important boundary was recorded explicitly: ProductOS should not market itself as a fully autonomous PM system or as an unattended always-current intelligence engine.

## Revalidate

The slice is acceptable for use as the current ProductOS communication surface because it is clearer, better bounded, and more honest about claim limits than the previous implicit documentation state.
